title: Use Case 1: Basic Report Generation
summary: Generate a structured report from distributed source fragments with deterministic local execution and no translation.

sourceFragments: Browser client captured usage metrics for three active regions.
Edge aggregation detected rising request volume and a stable error rate.
Cloud analytics recorded that the reporting module reduced triage time by eighteen percent.
